summary: Image edit (multipart). Dispatch invariant: no mask + platform model → platform (main image + references uploaded, main first); mask present OR non-platform model → llm-proxy gpt-image-2. Mask unconditionally goes to llm-proxy (platform has no mask capability).

scenarios.name: multipart body exceeds 40MB → 413 intent, observable as ECONNRESET
scenarios.sourceRef: readRequestBuffer L459-L475 via parseMultipartRequest L493 (request.destroy() at L468); catch L1027 sendMivoJson 413
scenarios.discrepancy: Same request.destroy() race as generate-413: socket torn down before 413 response delivered. Capture sends a ~41MB body; only the small transport-error record is committed. BFF must send clean 413.
scenarios.note: Capture sends a ~41MB body; only the small transport-error record is committed.

scenarios.name: platform path without MIVO_PLATFORM_KEY (no mask)

request.body: multipart: image + prompt + model=gpt-image-2, no mask

scenarios.condition: MIVO_PLATFORM_KEY unset or not starting with 'mivo_'

body.error: MIVO_PLATFORM_KEY 未配置，请配置或切换 GPT 模型

scenarios.name: platform upload failure → 502 (desensitized)
scenarios.condition: platform key set but mivoPlatformUploadOne fails (4xx/5xx/retry exhausted)

body.error: 参考图上传失败，请重试或移除参考图

scenarios.sourceRef: L972-L981 (catch → 502 fixed message, does NOT fall into outer 500 catch)
scenarios.note: Fixed desensitized copy. NOT live-captured: requires reachable platform endpoint that rejects uploads.

scenarios.name: normal 200 (platform, no mask)
scenarios.condition: platform key valid + upload + submit/poll/download succeed
scenarios.note: NOT live-captured: requires real platform key. Main image is index 0 of payload.images (L971 invariant).

scenarios.name: normal 200 (llm-proxy, mask or non-platform model)
scenarios.condition: MIVO_IMAGE_API_KEY valid; mask present OR model not in MIVO_PLATFORM_CHANNELS
scenarios.note: NOT live-captured: requires real llm-proxy key. Forwards image/mask/reference[]/model/prompt/quality/ratioPayload (L994-L1004).

scenarios.name: llm-proxy upstream timeout → 504
scenarios.sourceRef: mivoEditUpstreamTimeoutMs=180000 L35; fetchUpstreamWithTimeout L1006-L1016; catch L1027

scenarios.name: platform timeout/failed/download-empty → 504/502/502 (same as generate)
scenarios.note: See generate.json scenarios; edit reuses the same platform job runner.

invariants: mask present ⇒ unconditionally llm-proxy (L960: usePlatform = !mask && in-channels)
platform path: main image is index 0 of allImages, references appended after (L971)
quality clamped low|medium|high default medium (L954, L527-L530)
client abort → controller.abort() on response close (L966-L969)
